description: You are preparing a spaced-repetition 'sentence mining' deck for language learners. Using the source video at /home/ga/Videos/sintel_trailer.mp4, the subtitle track at /home/ga/Documents/dialogue_subs.srt, and the vocabulary list at /home/ga/Documents/vocab_list.csv, extract three assets for each of the 5 target words: an MP3 audio snippet, a hardsubbed H.264 MP4 video clip with subtitles burned into the frames (no separate subtitle stream), and a PNG snapshot captured at the start_time. Save all 15 files to /home/ga/Documents/AnkiDeck/ using the naming convention [id]_[target_word].[extension]. Create a JSON manifest at /home/ga/Documents/AnkiDeck/deck_manifest.json containing an array of 5 objects documenting the deliverables, with each object containing the keys: 'id', 'target_word', 'audio_file', 'video_file', 'image_file', and 'duration_sec'.
